input.background: We propose to calculate a $95 \%$ confidence interval for the risk difference in the estrogen trial presented earlier. We've established that $a_1=751$ and $n_1=8506$ in the treatment group. In the control group, $a_2=623$ and $n_2=8102$.
input.question: Calculate the adjusted proportions for the treatment group and control group, including $\tilde{p}_1$ and $\tilde{p}_2$.

a1.description: Number of events in the treatment group

n1.description: Total number of subjects in the treatment group

a2.description: Number of events in the control group

n2.description: Total number of subjects in the control group
